══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Triton — Iron Concentration --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:12+4=16 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Triton — Iron Concentration (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Triton — Iron Concentration
→ Bite: [d20:20+10=30 vs AC 14] CRITICAL HIT! 35 damage. Triton — Iron Concentration HP: 32/67
→ Bite: [d20:7+10=17 vs AC 14] HIT! 20 damage. Triton — Iron Concentration HP: 12/67
→ Bite: [d20:8+10=18 vs AC 14] HIT! 14 damage. Triton — Iron Concentration HP: -2/67
